    • basicL
  • Glossary
  • Reference

Generic methods for the L component

Source: R/aquatic-help.R
L_functions.Rd

A list of generic

  • dLdt – compute derivatives

  • Update_Lt – update state variables

  • LBionomics – compute bionomic parameters

  • LEffectSizes – apply vector control effect sizes

  • F_emerge – compute emergent adults

  • setup_L_obj – set up the L module object

  • setup_L_ix – set index values

  • setup_L_inits – set up initial values

  • get_L_inits – get initial values

  • change_L_inits – change initial values

  • get_L_vars – list state variables

  • get_L_pars – get parameters

  • change_L_pars – change parameters

  • parse_L_orbits – parse outputs

  • get_L_orbits – get saved orbits

  • steady_state_L – compute steady states

  • check_L – run consistency checks

  • skill_set_L – return module skill set

Developed by David L. Smith, Sean L. Wu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
